case_title: ANTONIO CAVILLO VS. YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVILLO, ANTONIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. WORTHINGTON, WILLIAM $1,713.44 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,713.44, DEFENDANTS SHALL SHARE LIABILITY EQUALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,242.00 FILED BY CAVILLO, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. WORTHINGTON, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PARTIALLY SATISFIED, *PARTIAL PAYMENT $856.72* AS TO DEFENDANT WORTHINGTON, WILLIAM
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVILLO, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT WORTHINGTON, WILLIAM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-20-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ PRESENT ON HIS BEHALF. DEFENDANT YELL CAB PRESENT. LOUISE MANOS APPEARS ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT WILLIAM WOETHINGTON. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-24-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WORTHINGTON, WILLIAM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2010 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVILLO, ANTONIO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVILLO, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
